name: Stanley Black & Decker, Inc.
description: Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. is a leading global diversified industrial company and the world's largest tool manufacturer. Headquartered in the United States, the company provides a wide range of industrial tools, household hardware, and security solutions. With a rich history dating back to 1843, it operates a vast network of manufacturing facilities worldwide. The company is widely recognized for its iconic brands, including Stanley, Black+Decker, DEWALT, and CRAFTSMAN, serving professional users, industrial customers, and homeowners across the globe with innovative products designed to help them build, repair, and protect their world.
